text:
Gon, that guy (ゴンってやつは, GONtte yatsu wa...) is a song from the Musical Hunter × Hunter, sung by Kurapika's 1999 anime adaptation voice actress, Yuki Kaida; Leorio's 1999 anime adaptation voice actor, Hozumi Gōda; Killua's 1999 anime adaptation voice actress, Kanako Mitsuhashi and Gon's 1999 anime adaptation voice actress, Junko Takeuchi.
